title: Dragon Egg Recipe
description: Now you can craft your own dragon egg
body:
🐉 Dragon Egg Recipe Datapack — *End Rebirth Edition*  
Craft the symbol of finality—no portal hopping required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the **Dragon Egg**, letting players duplicate the rarest trophy using high-tier End and Nether resources.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 4 Dragon’s Breath + 4 Respawn Anchors + 1 Dragon Egg  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with End progression and resurrection mechanics  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+
